rationale: Review 2 catches two real, diff-grounded naming problems: the `Is`-prefix inconsistency (the same file already uses `IsUnipotent`, making the bare `AffineAlgGroup`/`ReductiveGroup`/`SemisimpleGroup` internally inconsistent) and the `unipotent_radical_trivial : True` name-vs-content overstatement. Acting on these produces a measurably more consistent file; Review 1 leaves both issues standing.
